dateline: Hawthorne, CA / Boca Chica, TX — May 2002–Present
heroHeadline: Booster 19 Fires All 33 Raptor 3 Engines — IFT-12 Ground Milestones Cleared; 600th Booster Landing Imminent
heroSubtitle: 8,749 days of reusability milestones — 47 launches in 2026 (599 total recoveries); Booster 19 completed historic 33-engine 15-second static fire Apr 16 at Pad 2; Ship 39 static fire Apr 15 — both V3 IFT-12 vehicles cleared for stacking; Starlink 17-22 (B1097) targeting Apr 19 for milestone 600th Falcon booster landing; IPO vesting schedule accelerated Apr 16
footerNote: Data sourced from SpaceX.com, FAA, NASA, SpaceNews, NASASpaceflight.com, Spaceflight Now, Teslarati, TeslaOracle, CNBC, Bloomberg, TechCrunch, TIME, Space.com, Northrop Grumman
